# Nano Banana — LLM Full Summary
> Nano Banana is a static, SEO‑friendly hub about a new text‑guided image editing model. We focus on reproducible benchmarks, prompt recipes, and quickstarts. The site is English‑first, minimal/Google‑style UI, mobile‑friendly, and deployable to Vercel.

## Mission
Help users quickly understand what the model is, how to run it, and how it compares with alternatives like FLUX Kontext. All examples are designed to be reproducible.

## Structure
- Home: https://www.nano-banana.live/
  - Hero explaining the model and scope
  - CTA: Try in LMArena (https://lmarena.ai/?chat-modality=image)
  - Cards linking to Benchmarks / Quickstart / Prompts
- Benchmarks index: https://www.nano-banana.live/benchmarks/index.html
  - **Artificial Analysis Leaderboards**: Full Top 10 rankings for Text-to-Image and Image Editing
  - Real-time Elo scores, confidence intervals, pricing, and release dates
  - Company favicon icons for all model creators
  - Filter by: All, Current, Open Weights
  - Data sourced from: https://artificialanalysis.ai/image/leaderboard/
- Portrait Editing Benchmark: https://www.nano-banana.live/benchmarks/portrait-editing.html
  - Inputs to download, fixed params, and pipeline steps
  - A/B slider: left (FLUX Kontext) vs right (Nano Banana)
- Quickstart: https://www.nano-banana.live/guides/quickstart.html
  - Preserves the main local-install URL and H1 for SEO stability
  - Adds fast route-selection links for cloud API, no-GPU cloud options, open editing, open T2I, text rendering, and fast local generation
  - Adds featured open-model visual previews for HiDream-O1-Image, HunyuanImage 3.0, and Qwen-Image
  - Includes a "No GPU? Run in the cloud" callout and contextual prompt in the Nano Banana 2 section
  - Includes offline model overview, hardware notes, galleries, and setup commands
- Run Without a GPU: https://www.nano-banana.live/blog/run-without-gpu.html
  - Targets the site's most common search intent (no-GPU / local alternatives)
  - Compares Nano Banana 2 API, RunPod/Vast.ai cloud GPU rentals, and lightweight local models
  - Includes a decision table and disclosure for affiliate/referral links
- HiDream-O1-Image Guide: https://www.nano-banana.live/guides/hidream-o1-image.html
  - Dedicated long-tail SEO page for HiDream-O1-Image local install and open-source status
  - Distinguishes MIT open-source HiDream-O1-Image 8B from closed commercial HiDream-O1-Image-1.5
  - Includes visual examples, hardware planning, official repository links, setup outline, and model selection guidance
- Prompts: https://www.nano-banana.live/prompts/index.html
  - Copy‑ready prompt recipes with suggested parameters
- FAQ: https://www.nano-banana.live/faq.html
- About: https://www.nano-banana.live/about.html

## Content model
- Benchmark
  - fields: title, description, inputs (urls), params (seed, steps, guidance, strength, scheduler), pipeline steps, comparison images
- Prompt
  - fields: title, prompt text, params (seed, steps, guidance, strength), notes
- Guide
  - fields: title, route (colab/local), code blocks, assets

## Technical notes for crawlers
- All URLs use explicit .html extensions for consistency. Internal navigation uses index.html for directory pages to ensure compatibility with local file:// browsing.
- Sitemap: https://www.nano-banana.live/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://www.nano-banana.live/robots.txt
- OG image: https://www.nano-banana.live/og.svg
- Theme color: #0b0f14; color-scheme: dark

## Update cadence
- Benchmarks: updated when new tasks/inputs are verified
- Prompts: incremental additions
- Quickstart: updated after tooling, model availability, UX entry-point changes, or notebooks change
- Model guide pages: added for high-value long-tail SEO terms when a model has enough search and comparison value

## Contact
- Use the About page for ownership/credits; no newsletter or comments for MVP.
